ogTitle: Paddington vs Paddys Green: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Paddington and Paddys Green.
heading: Paddington vs Paddys Green — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Paddington, Queensland and Paddys Green, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Paddys Green has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Paddington (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Paddington or Paddys Green safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Paddington has a flood risk score of 21/100, while Paddys Green scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Paddington scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Paddys Green scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Paddington or Paddys Green?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Paddys Green has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
